description:
Promote the design docs to current. Move .agent/targets/{type-naming,type-world,set-theoretic-types,protocols}.md into .agent/docs/ (they describe the now-current system); write the specs.md delta (construction seam reads TypeDefined, not a per-call ModuleTypeEnv) and the modules.md delta (NamespaceSymbol::Type; the namespace bridges type names too). The northstar Type-Naming section already landed; reconcile any drift. Verify: docs match the landed code -- present-tense, honest structures, no chronology.

Reconcile the target docs with the .11 in-house-parse design: type-naming.md Where-it-lives must describe a compiler2-owned env-free type-expr parser + namespace captured at the declaration point (NOT a reused legacy type_expr::parse_type_expr), and name-vs-var classification as a namespace question. type-world.md/​set-theoretic-types.md unaffected.
title: Promote .agent/targets -> .agent/docs; specs.md/modules.md deltas; northstar reconcile
